creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to owk from comment #0)

Even after the maintainer timeout this patch does not look like a benefit to the users:

> The GTK interface of yersinia is still in alpha status and thus buggy, e.g. the program crashes if one moves around in the GUI.

In this case it would be really better to wait until the GTK interface is somewhat usable. Closing this for now. We can have a second look when the GTK interface is more stable.
